signals.headline: US-Iran Peace Talks Eyed to Resume Before April 7 Ceasefire Expires | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
US-Iran Peace Talks Eyed to Resume Before April 7 Ceasefire Expires | NO | HIGH confidence**  
No ceasefire has been confirmed, announced, or resolved; instead, talks in Islamabad ended without a deal, but both sides are planning fresh negotiations this week before the existing two-week ceasefire (announced April 7) expires next week[1][2][3].  
Trump maintains a port blockade and Strait of Hormuz
